message:
Fix flaky timing assertion in TestLogger test

Increase the wait timeout from 50ms to 60ms in the getDuration() test
to account for timer precision variations across different environments.

The test asserts that getDuration() returns at least 50ms, but the
setTimeout(50) was sometimes completing slightly under 50ms due to
timer resolution limits, causing intermittent failures.

Adding a 10ms buffer ensures the assertion reliably passes while still
validating that duration tracking works correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
